title: Traps & Treasures
description: Traps & Treasures is a mod that adds treasure chests that generate in caves as well as multiple types of traps in return.
body:
Traps & Treasures is a mod that adds treasure chests that generate in caves as well as multiple types of traps in return.

![logo_iamge](https://i.imgur.com/AHmEkXB.png)

Common treasure chests can be found underground between Y level 40 and -60.

Rare treasure chest can be found underground between Y level 5 and -60 but are more common the deeper you go.


<details>
<summary>Loot found in chests</summary>

![treasure_image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b301eab129e600e08928f1253f90341459af3d56_0.webp)

Rare chest loot is on the right.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Types of traps</summary>

The trapped chest and pressure plate trap can spawn with tnt or a dispenser underneath.

![traps_image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/534faf427743ab667aca7d65c36f977229af9fb1.png)


</details>


This mod doesn't add any new Blocks/items into the game and if hosted on a server, it doesn't require players to have the mod downloaded.

![Made with MCreator](https://i.imgur.com/nA5eh0n.png)
